data.title: CANEUS International partners with Maharashtra province at WEF Davos to establish global innovation institute.
data.description: In a significant development, an announcement was made in DAVOS, Switzerland on January 23, 2026 regarding the establishment of the world's pioneering Global Mid-TRL Innovation Acceleration and Skilling Institute. This institute is designed to focus on aerospace, space, energy, and deep technology sectors. The groundbreaking initiative is a collaboration between CANEUS International and the Government of Maharashtra, India. This initiative aims to bolster innovation and skills development in these key industries.

data.title: Dow fell after Greenland deal rally; Intel plunged on earnings. Live coverage on stock market updates.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline after a two-day increase driven by the Greenland deal excitement. Intel faced a significant drop in its stock value due to earnings performance. The overall market sentiment today was negative, with the Dow falling as a result of these factors. This event was covered live on Investor's Business Daily, providing real-time updates on the situation. The Dow's movement reflected the impact of the Greenland deal rally and Intel's earnings report, contributing to the market downturn.

data.title: Dow Jones futures drop with Intel's decline, but Nvidia gains in China. Tesla ends Autopilot.
data.description: Stock market futures experienced a decline following a sharp drop in Intel's stock, although there are indications that Nvidia's sales of its H200 chips in China may be picking up. In addition, Tesla made significant announcements regarding their self-driving robotaxi technology. The Dow Jones futures were impacted by Intel's performance, while Nvidia's boost in China and Tesla's advancements in Autopilot technology were noteworthy developments in the market.

data.title: Indonesia's Buy Now Pay Later market set to reach $11.15 billion in 2026, growing by 22.2% annually.
data.description: A report on Indonesia's Buy Now Pay Later (BNPL) business and investment opportunities has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The BNPL payment market in Indonesia is projected to increase by 22.2% annually, reaching a value of US$11.15 billion by 2026. The country's buy now pay later market showed strong growth in 2022-202.

data.title: NYSE reports pre-market update today, with BitGo rising 2.7% in NYSE debut on Jan. 23, 2026. Kristen Scholer delivers update.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) released its daily pre-market update from the NYSE Trading Floor, offering valuable market insights to investors. Kristen Scholer presented the pre-market update on this date, providing crucial information for trading before the market opens. This update includes important numbers and data relevant to the day's trading activities, guiding investors on potential market trends and movements. Investors are encouraged to review the NYSE Pre-market update regularly for informed decision-making in the dynamic world of stock trading.

data.title: Middlefield Healthcare Dividend ETF (TSX: MHCD) announces distributions for Q1 2026 to unitholders.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, the Middlefield Healthcare Dividend ETF (TSX: MHCD) disclosed that distributions for the initial quarter of 2026 will be provided to unitholders of the ETF. The specific payment details were not disclosed in the provided information.

data.title: Global commercial air purifiers market valued at $16.80B in 2024, projected to reach $26.70B by 2030, with CAGR of 8.03% - key players include Honeywell, Daikin, IQAir.
data.description: In Dublin, it was reported that the global market for Commercial Air Purifiers, valued at USD 16.80 billion in 2024, is estimated to grow to USD 26.70 billion by 2030, indicating a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.03%. The competitive scenario in the industry is described as moderately fragmented, with key players such as Honeywell, Daikin, IQAir, and others engaged in intense competition.

data.title: Boeing helps secure $244B in US overseas contracts, nearly triple 2024 levels, boosting job creation.
data.description: In 2025, U.S. companies, notably Boeing Co. (NYSE: BA), have secured foreign government procurement contracts totaling $244 billion. This figure represents a significant increase from the previous year, with a notable rise in Boeing jetliner orders contributing to the surge. The contracts, facilitated by the U.S. Commerce Department's International Trade Administration (ITA), include approximately $206 billion in U.S. export content and are projected to bolster around 844,000 American jobs. These agreements are attributed to recent trade deals championed by President Donald Trump. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: CGTN showcases China Crafted at ART SG 2026 in Singapore, featuring display of previous seasons; impresses art enthusiasts.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, in Singapore, CGTN introduced China Crafted, the newest installment of its CGTN Art Series, during ART SG 2026. The event also featured a collection showcasing the past three seasons of the series. Various well-known figures and a significant crowd of art lovers were in attendance.

data.title: Saudi Arabia emerging as a "connector economy" at WEF26 in Davos, Switzerland, amid evolving world trade dynamics.
data.description: Reported from Davos, Switzerland, during the World Economic Forum 26, Saudi Arabia is emerging as a "connector economy" amidst the evolving landscape of global trade. This development signifies the country's growing importance in facilitating international commerce and fostering connections between various markets. Saudi Arabia's shift towards becoming a key player in the global trade realm is highlighted at a crucial juncture where economic interactions between nations are rapidly changing. This transformation underscores the country's strategic positioning and potential impact on the global trade dynamics.

data.title: UBS may offer crypto trading to wealthy clients, providing access to digital assets at one of the top private banks.
data.description: This initiative aims to provide ultra-wealthy individuals with a direct entry point into the cryptocurrency market through an internal platform within a leading private bank on a global scale.

data.title: Once Upon a Coconut now available at Costco in Southeast & Texas, offering 12-can case of Coconut Water + Chocolate.
data.description: Starting from January 23, 2026, Once Upon a Coconut (OUAC) has introduced their popular Coconut Water + Chocolate in a convenient 12-can case for members at Costco in Orlando, Florida. OUAC is a renowned brand for its delicious flavor and healthier hydration options. This new offering allows customers to stock up on this fan-favorite product in larger quantities.

data.title: Monica Lewinsky's special reveals memorable moments from 2025, including John Oliver's fear, Miley Cyrus explaining WAP, Gabrielle Union's trip to Ghana, and Chelsea Handler's emotional breakthrough.
data.description: John Oliver was initially concerned that the Dalai Lama would not be entertaining, but he ended up being funny. Miley Cyrus discussed WAP with Monica, Gabrielle Union talked about her profound journey to Ghana where she connected with her ancestors, and Chelsea Handler shared a moving personal revelation. This compilation featured a range of experiences and emotions from notable individuals.

data.title: Hasanuddin University research studies potential of natural humectant from Caulerpa racemosa in skincare market.
data.description: In Makassar, Indonesia on January 23, 2026, the skincare industry is experiencing significant growth as a worldwide market. The need for safe and natural ingredients is increasing, with a particular focus on biodegradable components, ethical sourcing, and eco-friendly practices in response to consumer demand. This trend indicates a shift towards more sustainable and environmentally conscious products in the beauty sector amid rising concerns over synthetic products.

data.title: Electrified Thermal Solutions launches first commercial-scale Joule Hive™ Thermal Battery, offering industries low-cost, clean heat up to 1,800°C.
data.description: A new system operating at a multi-megawatt scale demonstrates that industries now have the ability to obtain affordable, environmentally friendly high-temperature electrified heat reaching up to 1,800°C. Electrified Thermal Solutions, headquartered in Boston and known for their large-scale low-cost thermal energy storage solutions, disclosed this innovation on January 23, 2026. This development signifies a significant advancement in providing efficient heat solutions for industrial applications.

data.title: US Anesthesia Partners collaborates with GE to bring AI into anesthesia, focusing on improving patient experience and clinician productivity.
data.description: US Anesthesia Partners, Inc. (USAP) has revealed a new partnership with GE on Jan. 23, 2026 in Dallas. The collaboration's main objective is to develop innovative tools to enhance patient satisfaction and results, as well as to boost efficiency for healthcare providers and hospitals. This initiative is designed to address the growing demands within the healthcare sector.
